#弅喃木剉﹛﹛??﹛巟鼹
#
#﹛﹛﹛凌607972及摒

###﹛凌607972午凌607982毛赭当

block Item_607972 >= 1 && Item_607982 >= 1

	KillItem 607972,1,(3004861)
	KillItem 607982,1,(3004862)
	GiveItem(607680%15,607685%10,608600%10,608603%10,607991%15,607708%15,631056%5,631057%10,631058%10),(3004863)



###﹛宁丹坁互卅中

block

	SystemMessage 3004868
